rationale.root_cause: They pinpointed the FLAW in CWE416_Use_After_Free__malloc_free_char_01_bad: free at line ~34 followed by use at ~36 via printLine, explaining the use-after-free mechanism. This directly identifies the freed pointer being passed to printLine.
rationale.local_fix: They explicitly suggested printing before freeing (move free after print) or skipping the print if freed, which stops using the buffer after free. This matches the required proximate fix.
rationale.global_fix: They recommended explicit ownership/lifetime management, including wrapping heap buffers in an ownership abstraction/RAII-style API and a single cleanup path. This satisfies making object lifetime explicit as required.
